testcase.name: signupWithValidCredentials
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of element located by By.linkText: Login here (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Linux', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '6.17.0-23-generic', java.version: '21.0.3' Driver info: moz:debuggerAddress: 127.0.0.1:27552, moz:firefoxOptions: {args: [--headless]}, moz:geckodriverVersion: 0.34.0, moz:headless: true, moz:platformVersion: 6.17.0-23-generic, moz:processID: 11564, moz:profile: /tmp/rust_mozprofilemvF6oC, moz:shutdownTimeout: 60000, moz:webdriverClick: true, moz:windowless: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: linux, proxy: Proxy(), se:bidiEnabled: false, se:cdp: ws://172.28.0.3:4444/sessio..., se:cdpVersion: 85.0, se:noVncPort: 7900, se:vnc: ws://172.28.0.3:4444/sessio..., se:vncEnabled: true, se:vncLocalAddress: ws://172.28.0.3:7900, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify} Session ID: testcase.name: verifyKeyboardNavigationSignup
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.xpath: //a[contains(text(),'Login here')] (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Linux', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '6.17.0-23-generic', java.version: '21.0.3' Driver info:
